rollback_decision_rows.condition: Fixture replay output diverges from committed expected manifest.
rollback_decision_rows.decision: Hold packet and request manual review before any next step.

held_source_citation_continuity_checks.expectation: Every rollback decision row keeps a citation reference to a held public-source fixture.
held_source_citation_continuity_checks.required_result: manual reviewer confirms citation continuity before promotion

affected_agent_capability_notes.effect: Agents may compare committed fixture metadata only and must stop before external retrieval.
Agents may produce attended handoff notes only and must not store browser state.

safe_downgrade_expectations.behavior: Use fixture-only requirement summaries when replay validation is unavailable.
safe_downgrade_expectations.user_visible_status: degraded fixture validation pending manual review

manual_reviewer_approval_placeholders.label: manual reviewer approval pending
manual_reviewer_approval_placeholders.required_before: promotion out of inactive packet state

recovery_journal_event_templates.summary_template: Manual reviewer receives fixture replay diff and held citation list.
Agent refuses consequential or external action while packet remains inactive.
